rewritten_requirements: The system shall maintain a database of criminal records.
The system shall ensure the security of crime reports data.
The system shall automate the tracking of crime records.
The system shall maintain a comprehensive database of all crime activities within the state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system keeps a record of criminals who have been arrested, to be arrested, or escaped.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The proposed crime bureau is a database system in which the police keeps the record of criminals who have been arrested, to be arrested, or escaped and the complaints.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides proper security for crime reports data.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This system needs more manpower to track the records of crimes and it lacks security.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system reduces manual work in tracking crime records.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: In the existing system, all work is done on papers, so it is very difficult to secure crime reports data.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system maintains a database of entire crime activities in the state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This project helps to maintain a database through which the entire crime activities in the state can be monitored (Figures 20.1–20.8).
